name: Armoured Undersuit
effect: This fighter can reroll an injury roll during the end phase.

name: Auspex
effect: Target an enemy within 12" they lose the benefit of Cover until the end of the round.

name: Bionic Arm
effect: Restore WS to original value. Gain +1 Weapon Skill to Melee attacks with this arm.

name: Bionic Eye
effect: Restore BS to original value. Fighter ignores negative modifiers from Cover.

name: Bionic Leg
effect: Restore Move to original value. Ignore the first 3" of vertical climbing distance.

name: Camo Cloak
effect: This fighter gains a Stealth token.

name: Carapace Armour
effect: This fighter gains +2 Defence.

name: Combat Drugs
effect: Once per battle, this fighter gains +1 Weapon Skill and +1 Attack to Melee weapons for the rest of their activation. At the end of their activation this fighter takes 1d6 damage.

name: Dataslate
effect: +1 dice when interacting with computer terminals or hacking.

name: Flak Armour
effect: This fighter gains +1 Defence.

name: Scout Armour
effect: This fighter gains +2 Defence.

name: Gas Mask
effect: This fighter is immune to "Gas" or "Toxic" weapon traits.

name: Grapnel Line
effect: Climb vertical surfaces up to 6” high without spending extra movement.

name: Grav-chute
effect: This fighter can move down any vertical distance for free without triggering a fall.

name: Holy Icon
effect: Friendly fighters within 6" add +1 to Bravery checks.

name: Infantry Primer
effect: This fighter ignores the first failed Bravery test of the game.

name: Jump Pack
effect: This fighter gains the Fly runemark and +2 Move.

name: Magnoculars
effect: Reveal a Stealthed enemy within 12". They lose Stealth and cannot regain it this round.

name: Master-Crafted Kit
effect: Once per game, re-roll a single failed hit roll with a specific weapon.

name: Medi-pack
effect: Choose a friendly fighter within 1". That fighter heals 1D3 Wounds.

name: Medikit
effect: Heal a friendly fighter within 1" for 1D6 Wounds.

name: Neural Processor
effect: Fighter may use abilities normally in Round 1. Gain +1 to X when using abilities to a max of 6.

name: Photo Goggles
effect: This fighter ignores the effects of Smoke or Darkness when checking Line of Sight.

name: Power Armour
effect: This fighter gains +3 Defence.

name: Purity Seals
effect: Immune to 'Fear' or 'Corruption' effects.

name: Refractor Field
effect: Until the end of the round, each time this fighter suffers damage, roll a dice; on a 5+, ignore that damage.

name: Repair Kit
effect: Target a fighter within 6 with the Cybernetic trait, remove X wounds from them.

name: Servo-Skull
effect: This fighter can attempt "Interact" actions from up to 3" away instead of 1".

name: Shield
effect: This fighter gains +1 Defence against Melee attacks.

name: Shovel
effect: Place a "Hasty Cover" marker. Provides Light Cover to one fighter.

name: Silencer
effect: An equipped Pistol gains the Silent trait.

name: Smoke Canister
effect: Create 3" smoke area within 6" (Blocks LoS). Once per game.

name: Synthetic Grafting
effect: The "one move action per turn" restriction is removed.

name: The Emperor's Tarot
effect: Roll dice equal to ability value. For each 4+, gain 1 Wild Dice.

name: Vox bead
effect: Ignore range for abilities if the target also has a Comlink.

name: Vox-caster
effect: Increases the range of the Leader's Command ability to 12".

name: Vox Scrambler
effect: Enemies within 6” cannot use communication abilities this round.

name: Energy Shield
effect: This model gains a 4+ Invulnerable Save (ignore damage on a 4+).

name: Markerlight
effect: Simple Action to paint targets. Friendly Fighters gain +1 Attack dice against this target.

name: Auxiliary Grenade Launcher
effect: Grenades fired by this Fighter have a range of 0-12.

name: Storm Shield
effect: This shield gives +1 Defence. Requires a hand to use.

name: Cybernetic
effect: This fighter has an parts of their anatomy replaced with cybernetics. They gain +1 def.

name: Resurrection Orb
effect: Once per battle, you may reroll failed Reanimation Protocols checks for all friendly Necrons within 6".

name: Phase Shifter
effect: This fighter gains a 4+ Invulnerable Save.

name: Quantum Shielding
effect: This fighter cannot be damaged by attacks with the 'Lethal' or 'Melta' traits.

name: Chronometron
effect: Target a friendly fighter within 6". Until the next round, attackers suffer -1 to hit that fighter.
